name: bitcoin-guestbook-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for the Bitcoin Guestbook smart contract on Stacks blockchain
author: realvic22

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/index.js';let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace(/Object.defineProperty\(exports,\s*'__esModule',\s*\{ value: true \}\);\n?/g,'');fs.writeFileSync(f,c)" && cp dist/index.js dist/index.mjs
